headline: Is Deere & Company (DE) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is DE a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Deere & Company on Trevor Young’s Substack. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on DE. Deere & Company’s share was trading at $594.52 as of April 20th. DE’s trailing and forward P/E were 33.53 and 33.44 respectively according to Yahoo Finance. Deere & Company […]
